languages.text: {n}Тервантьяс буравит вас взглядом.{/n} "Триумф можно одержать лишь над равным себе. Я же снизошел до уровня жалкого образца, потребовав от него признания, но он — всего лишь вещь. Теперь эта вещь мне наскучила, как и твой скулеж. Забирай".

{n}Tervantias fixes you with a piercing stare.{/n} "Triumph can only be won over an equal. I lowered myself to this miserable specimen's stature by calling for its admission, yet it is nothing but a thing. Now, this thing has grown as tiresome to me as your whimpering. Take it away."
languages.original_text: {n}Тервантьяс буравит вас взглядом.{/n} "Триумф можно одержать лишь над равным себе. Я же снизошел до уровня жалкого образца, потребовав от него признания, но он — всего лишь вещь. Теперь эта вещь мне наскучила, как и твой скулеж. Забирай".

languages.text: {n}Tervantias fixiert dich mit einem durchbohrenden Blick.{/n} "Man kann nur über einen ebenbürtigen Gegner triumphieren. Ich habe mich auf das Niveau dieses jämmerlichen Versuchsstücks herabgelassen, indem ich ein Geständnis forderte, aber es ist nur ein Ding. Und jetzt ist dieses Ding ebenso ermüdend wie Euer Gejammer. Schafft es weg."
languages.original_text: {n}Tervantias fixes you with a piercing stare.{/n} "Triumph can only be won over an equal. I lowered myself to this miserable specimen's stature by calling for its admission, yet it is nothing but a thing. Now, this thing has grown as tiresome to me as your whimpering. Take it away."

Ich habe mich auf das Niveau dieses jämmerlichen Versuchsstücks herabgelassen, indem ich ein Geständnis forderte, aber es ist nur ein Ding. Und jetzt ist dieses Ding ebenso ermüdend wie Euer Gejammer. Schafft es weg."

languages.text: {n}Tervantias vous fixe de son regard perçant.{/n} « On ne triomphe que face à un égal. Je me suis abaissé au niveau de ce spécimen en l'admettant ici, mais il n'en valait pas la peine. À présent, je suis tout aussi las de cette situation que de vos gémissements. Enlevez-moi ça. »
languages.original_text: {n}Tervantias fixes you with a piercing stare.{/n} "Triumph can only be won over an equal. I lowered myself to this miserable specimen's stature by calling for its admission, yet it is nothing but a thing. Now, this thing has grown as tiresome to me as your whimpering. Take it away."

traits.locale_text: {n}Tervantias vous fixe de son regard perçant.{/n} « On ne triomphe que face à un égal. Je me suis abaissé au niveau de ce spécimen en l'admettant ici, mais il n'en valait pas la peine. À présent, je suis tout aussi las de cette situation que de vos gémissements. Enlevez-moi ça. »

languages.text: {n}Tervantias te lanza una mirada penetrante.{/n} «Un triunfo solo puede darse contra un igual. Me he rebajado al nivel de este miserable espécimen exigiendo que admitiera sus faltas, pero no es más que una cosa. Ahora me resulta tan tedioso como tus quejas. Llévatelo».
languages.original_text: {n}Tervantias fixes you with a piercing stare.{/n} "Triumph can only be won over an equal. I lowered myself to this miserable specimen's stature by calling for its admission, yet it is nothing but a thing. Now, this thing has grown as tiresome to me as your whimpering. Take it away."

traits.locale_text: {n}Tervantias te lanza una mirada penetrante.{/n} «Un triunfo solo puede darse contra un igual. Me he rebajado al nivel de este miserable espécimen exigiendo que admitiera sus faltas, pero no es más que una cosa. Ahora me resulta tan tedioso como tus quejas. Llévatelo».

languages.text: {n}Tervantias, delici bakışlarını sana çeviriyor.{/n} "Zafer, yalnızca dengin olana karşı kazanılabilir. İtirafını talep ederek kendimi bu sefil numuneyle aynı seviyeye indirmiş olabilir ancak o bir hiç. Artık bana senin sızlanmaların kadar sıkıcı geliyor. Götür şunu."
languages.original_text: {n}Tervantias fixes you with a piercing stare.{/n} "Triumph can only be won over an equal. I lowered myself to this miserable specimen's stature by calling for its admission, yet it is nothing but a thing. Now, this thing has grown as tiresome to me as your whimpering. Take it away."

languages.text: {n}特万提亚斯那锐利的目光转向了你。{/n}“只有面对旗鼓相当的对手，才配谈胜利。我自降身份与这个可怜虫交锋，可它终究只是个东西。现在，这东西和你的哀求一样，让我腻味透了。把它带走吧。”
languages.original_text: {n}Tervantias fixes you with a piercing stare.{/n} "Triumph can only be won over an equal. I lowered myself to this miserable specimen's stature by calling for its admission, yet it is nothing but a thing. Now, this thing has grown as tiresome to me as your whimpering. Take it away."

languages.text: {n}テルヴァンティアスは射抜くような視線をあなたに据える。{/n}「勝利とは、対等な者に対してのみ勝ち取れるものだ。私は、この惨めな標本に自白を求めることで、わざわざその程度にまで身を落としてやったというのに、所詮それはただの物にすぎん。今や、この物は貴様のめそめそした泣き言と同じくらい、私には煩わしくなった。連れていけ」
languages.original_text: {n}Tervantias fixes you with a piercing stare.{/n} "Triumph can only be won over an equal. I lowered myself to this miserable specimen's stature by calling for its admission, yet it is nothing but a thing. Now, this thing has grown as tiresome to me as your whimpering. Take it away."
